## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy's pivot strategy, including Express GTM motion, prophecy.ai launch, and content migration plans.](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is pivoting to a more product-led growth (PLG) approach, targeting hands-on users rather than buying committees](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - Launching "Express" offering (\<$50K/year) with outcome-based pricing and simplified adoption
  - [Planning to switch from prophecy.io to prophecy.ai domain with a radically changed website and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Aiming for a major feature launch and "opening the door" to PLG by end of October](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Express GTM Motion

  - [Shifting to enterprise outward sales motion with compact, deliverable version under $50K/year](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Focusing on hands-on users interested in achieving specific outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Moving away from backend data engineering focus to target more hands-on, tool-savvy personas](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Prophecy.ai Launch

  - [Planning to launch prophecy.ai in September (aggressive timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Radically changing company look and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Implementing "replays" feature allowing users to jump into real pipelines without registration](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Aiming to erode friction between marketing site and product experience](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Content Migration Strategy

  - [Considering how to maintain SEO value while pivoting to new positioning](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Exploring options for archiving or redirecting old content](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Planning to create new, persona-targeted content library for launch](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Balancing CEO's desire for clean break with need to maintain valuable traffic](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

### Growth Marketing Plans

  - [Shifting to growth marketing phase starting in October](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Exploring community-building and rewards systems for engaged users](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Considering how to leverage events and signals for more effective lead qualification](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [Planning major overhaul of website structure and content](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Implementing one-page design with enterprise tag, features, and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Focusing on showcasing "replays" and real product experiences](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tune current content pipeline to align with new Express messaging and persona focus](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Engage SEO experts to plan domain migration strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Analyze recent traffic uptick to identify successful content and audience alignment](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Marcel (GrowthX) to discuss pivot strategy in detail](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Prepare for accelerated content creation to support growth marketing phase](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Explore community-building and "working out loud" strategies for October launch](https://fathom.video/share/uomc68rhjwbemz19e1LBPz-j7QvRz1FV?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
